About the Institute

Some women are still waiting for the right time.

You are not that woman.

You are the one who keeps building — through the pressure, through the pivots, through every season that had no blueprint and no guarantee.

You have vision. You have drive. What you deserve is an institution that was built to match it.

The empowerHER Legacy Institute for Entrepreneurship Excellence exists for the woman who is done building alone.

We are a faith-forward, whole-woman entrepreneurship institute — combining the rigor of real-world business strategy with the kind of internal clarity that makes success not just achievable, but sustainable.

Because brilliance without structure collapses. And strategy without wholeness doesn’t last.

Because we recognize what the business world rarely acknowledges — that mental health is not separate from business performance. It is foundational to it.

This is not inspiration.
This is infrastructure.

This is where your vision gets a blueprint.
This is where your calling becomes a legacy.

Featured Curriculum

Your Vision Deserves a Blueprint Built for This.

Project Management for Real Life: Entrepreneurial Edition™ is the flagship curriculum of the empowerHER Legacy Institute for Entrepreneurship Excellence — developed by its founder, Kenya Young, a certified project manager and Fortune 500 strategist with a career spanning nearly three decades leading large-scale, high-value initiatives across global organizations and within her own businesses.

PMFRL takes the systems that power the world’s most successful organizations and translates them for the woman who is building on purpose — with faith as her foundation and legacy as her destination.

And Kenya doesn’t just teach it.

She uses it every day to build and operate her own ventures.

This is not a course.

This is infrastructure.

Project Management for Real Life™

PLAN with Precision
Systems & Structure
BUILD with Strategy
Execute & Launch
SCALE into Legacy
Sustain & Grow
